question_np: Nepal मा digital payment ecosystem कस्तो छ?
options_np: eSewa, Khalti, IME Pay, ConnectIPS — growing ecosystem
explanation_np: Nepal मा digital payment: eSewa, Khalti, IME Pay, ConnectIPS, fonePay — rapid growth।

options_np: NRB ले develop गरेको interbank payment system
explanation_np: ConnectIPS = NRB developed interbank payment system। Multiple bank accounts एकै platform।

options_np: QR based payment network — multiple banks/wallets connect
explanation_np: fonePay = QR based interoperable payment network connecting banks और digital wallets।

options_np: Bank को international identification code — international transfers
explanation_np: SWIFT = Society for Worldwide Interbank Financial Telecommunication। International bank transfers।
IBAN = International Bank Account Number। International transfers मा use हुन्छ।

options_np: Private key secure राख्ने, hardware wallet, 2FA, backup phrase safe
explanation_np: Crypto wallet: private key कसैलाई नदिनुस्, hardware wallet use, seed phrase secure offline राख्नुस्।

options_np: Verified marketplace, creator authenticity, unrealistic promises avoid
explanation_np: NFT scam: verified marketplaces (OpenSea), creator/project research, rug pull warning signs।

options_np: Smart contract bugs, rug pulls, unregulated — high risk
explanation_np: DeFi risks: smart contract vulnerabilities, rug pulls, no regulation, high volatility।

question_np: Rug pull भनेको के हो crypto मा?
options_np: Developers ले investors को fund लिएर project abandon गर्ने
explanation_np: Rug pull = crypto/NFT project developers ले fund collect गरेर suddenly project abandon।

question_np: Pump and dump scheme crypto मा?
options_np: Artificially price बढाएर sell गर्ने — investors lose
explanation_np: Pump and dump: coordinated buying ले price artificially raise, then sell — other investors lose।

options_np: NRB ले regulate गर्छ — Payment System Department
explanation_np: Nepal fintech: NRB Payment System Department regulate। Licensed operators list: nrb.org.np।

options_np: Third-party providers लाई bank data access दिने — customer consent सहित
explanation_np: Open banking = customer consent सहित third-party apps लाई bank data API access।

options_np: Application Programming Interface ले data secure transfer — authentication, encryption
explanation_np: API security: authentication, authorization, encryption, rate limiting — data breach prevent।

options_np: Actual card data replace गरेर unique token use — data breach protect
explanation_np: Tokenization: real card number replace with unique token — data breach मा actual card data safe।

options_np: Extra authentication layer for online card payments — OTP/password
explanation_np: 3D Secure = online card payment मा extra authentication (OTP) — unauthorized use prevent।

question_np: PCI DSS compliance भनेको के हो?
options_np: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard — card data protection
explanation_np: PCI DSS = Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard। Card payment businesses को लागि security requirement।

options_np: Licensed/verified escrow only, terms clear, both parties agree
explanation_np: Escrow: licensed service, clear terms, both parties verified — fake escrow common in property fraud।

question_np: Letter of Credit (LC) fraud Nepal मा?
options_np: Fake/altered LCs, document fraud — NRB licensed banks मात्र use
explanation_np: LC fraud: fake documents, altered terms। NRB licensed banks मार्फत मात्र LC transactions।

options_np: Counterparty verify, document authentication, bank involvement
explanation_np: Trade finance: counterparty background check, document authentication, licensed bank involvement।

options_np: Supplier verification, quality checks, audit trail, multiple sourcing
explanation_np: Supply chain fraud: supplier background check, regular quality audits, diversified suppliers।

question_np: Nepal मा social media influencer fraud?
options_np: Fake followers, fake endorsements, undisclosed paid promotions
explanation_np: Influencer fraud: fake followers/engagement, undisclosed paid promotions। Consumer protection apply।

options_np: Extreme ratings, generic language, reviewer profile (no history)
explanation_np: Fake reviews: all 5-star/1-star, generic/repeated phrases, reviewers with no history।

options_np: Fake grassroots movement create गर्ने — corporate/political manipulation
explanation_np: Astroturfing = fake grassroots support create गर्ने — corporate/political agenda को लागि।

question_np: Viral marketing vs Spam को फरक?
options_np: Viral: organic sharing, Spam: unsolicited mass messages
explanation_np: Viral: organic, valuable content। Spam: unsolicited, unwanted, often fraudulent messages।

options_np: Opt-in consent required — unsubscribe option mandatory
explanation_np: Email marketing: recipient consent (opt-in) required, unsubscribe option mandatory।

options_np: Telecom Regulatory Authority (TRA) र telecom companies मा report
explanation_np: SMS spam: TRA Nepal र Ncell/NTC customer care मा report। Spam number block र report।

options_np: Automated fraud calls — TRA र NTC/Ncell मा report
explanation_np: Robocall fraud: automated fake bank/government calls। TRA र telecom companies मा report।

question_np: Caller ID spoofing भनेको के हो?
options_np: Fake number display गरेर call — trusted number जस्तो देखाउने
explanation_np: Caller ID spoofing = fake phone number display। Bank/government को number देखाएर fraud।

options_np: Premium rate numbers बाट missed call — callback = charges
explanation_np: Missed call fraud: unknown numbers (especially international) बाट missed call — callback = high charges।

question_np: SIM swap fraud भनेको के हो?
options_np: Criminal ले victim को number आफ्नो SIM मा transfer गरेर account access
explanation_np: SIM swap = criminal ले telecom को manipulate गरेर victim को number आफ्नो SIM मा transfer — 2FA bypass।

options_np: Account PIN/password + telecom port freeze + non-SMS 2FA use
explanation_np: SIM swap prevent: telecom account PIN, number porting protection request, authenticator app (not SMS) 2FA।

options_np: Unauthorized SIM/number porting — telecom customer care immediately report
explanation_np: Unauthorized porting: तुरुन्त telecom customer care (Ncell: 9801099, NTC: 1600) मा report।

options_np: Unknown international numbers avoid, callback से पहले verify
explanation_np: International call fraud: unknown numbers callback नगर्नुस्। Premium rate scam common।

options_np: Single ring (missed call) scheme — callback = premium rate charges
explanation_np: Wangiri (Japanese: one ring) = single ring छोडेर callback गराउने — premium rate numbers।

options_np: Fake USSD codes मार्फत banking fraud — only official codes use
explanation_np: USSD fraud: fake codes ले banking info steal। Official USSD codes only (bank verified)।

question_np: Mobile number वा account security के हो?
options_np: Strong PIN + 2FA + suspicious activity monitoring + regular password change
explanation_np: Account security: strong unique password, 2FA, activity monitoring, regular password updates।

question_np: Account takeover fraud भनेको के हो?
options_np: Criminal ले victim को account credentials steal गरेर control लिने
explanation_np: Account takeover = phishing/malware/social engineering मार्फत credentials steal — account control।

question_np: Credential stuffing attack भनेको के हो?
options_np: Leaked passwords use गरेर multiple accounts try गर्ने
explanation_np: Credential stuffing = leaked username/password lists use गरेर multiple sites मा automated login try।

options_np: एउटा site breach भए सबै accounts compromise — unique passwords use
explanation_np: Password reuse: एउटा site breach = credential stuffing attack ले सबै accounts compromise।

options_np: Authenticator app (Google/Microsoft) > SMS > Email — security order
explanation_np: MFA security: Authenticator app (strongest) > SMS OTP (SIM swap risk) > Email OTP।

options_np: Fake government websites, unofficial fee collectors — .gov.np official sites मात्र
explanation_np: E-governance fraud: .gov.np domains मात्र official। Unofficial fee collectors avoid।

options_np: Ward office वा registrareoficefees.gov.np — official portals
explanation_np: Birth certificate: Ward/Municipal office वा official online portals। Unofficial services avoid।

options_np: Department of Passports: dop.gov.np — direct application
explanation_np: Passport: Department of Passports: dop.gov.np मा direct application। Agent avoid।

options_np: Department of Transport Management: dotm.gov.np — official process
explanation_np: Driving license: DOTM: dotm.gov.np मा direct application। Bribery illegal।

options_np: Fake citizenship, document tampering — District Administration Office + Police
explanation_np: Citizenship fraud: District Administration Office report + Nepal Police। Strict verification।

options_np: Nagarik App, Online services — digital transformation ongoing
explanation_np: Nepal digital government: Nagarik App, online services, e-passport — digital transformation।

question_np: Nagarik App Nepal मा के services छन्?
options_np: Government services — certificates, licenses, information — one platform
explanation_np: Nagarik App: government certificates, license renewal, information services — one platform।

options_np: Official app store बाट, developer verify, permissions check
explanation_np: Official Nagarik App: government approved app stores बाट। Developer: Nepal government। Fake apps avoid।

options_np: Official government payment portals मात्र — bank/digital wallet through official
explanation_np: Government fees: official portals (gov.np domains), licensed payment gateways। Unofficial avoid।

options_np: Yes — machine readable, biometric data embedded — Department of Passports
explanation_np: Nepal e-passport: machine readable, biometric (fingerprint, photo) embedded। DoP: dop.gov.np।

options_np: National Action Plan, THB Office, NGOs, awareness programs
explanation_np: Anti-trafficking: National Plan of Action, THB Office, Maiti Nepal, WOREC, awareness campaigns।

options_np: Children's Act 2018 — comprehensive child protection law
explanation_np: Children's Act 2018: comprehensive child protection — abuse, exploitation, trafficking, child labor।
Child Helpline Nepal: 1098। Child abuse, trafficking, exploitation — 24/7 service।

options_np: Police: 100, महिला आयोग: 1145, safe houses, legal aid
explanation_np: GBV: Police: 100, Women's Commission: 1145, safe houses available। Immediate safety priority।

options_np: Criminal offense — Acid Attack Control Act। Police: 100, hospital immediately
explanation_np: Acid attack: Acid Control Act — severe punishment। Emergency: Hospital + Police: 100।

options_np: Discrimination illegal — Nepal Supreme Court ruling। Police, NHRC report
explanation_np: Nepal Supreme Court ले LGBTQ+ rights protect गरेको छ। Discrimination: NHRC र Police report।

options_np: Fake disability claims, discrimination, benefit fraud — Social Welfare Report
explanation_np: Disability: fake claims: Social Welfare Council report। Discrimination: NHRC report।
Nepal Constitution ले minority rights protect। NHRC (National Human Rights Commission): 01-4200160।

options_np: National Human Rights Commission — human rights violations investigate
explanation_np: NHRC = National Human Rights Commission Nepal। Human rights violations investigate र remedy।
NHRC: 01-4200160, website: nhrcnepal.org। Human rights violations report।

options_np: Department of Labour: dol.gov.np, Labour Court — violations report
explanation_np: Labor rights: Department of Labour: dol.gov.np। Labor Court मा case file। Labor Act 2017।

question_np: Minimum wage Nepal मा कति हो?
options_np: Government ले periodically revise गर्छ — DoL website check गर्नुस्
explanation_np: Minimum wage Nepal ले periodically revise गर्छ। Current rate: dol.gov.np मा check।

options_np: Labour Act अनुसार overtime = 1.5x normal rate
explanation_np: Nepal Labour Act: overtime = 1.5x regular hourly rate। Employer refusal = labor violation।

options_np: 5+ years service = gratuity entitled — Labour Act
explanation_np: Nepal Labour Act: 5+ continuous years = gratuity entitlement। Employer must pay।

options_np: Labour Court मा case — reinstatement या compensation
explanation_np: Wrongful termination: Labour Court (District Court) मा case file — reinstatement या compensation।

options_np: Sexual Harassment at Workplace Prevention Act — employer report, Police, Court
explanation_np: Workplace sexual harassment: Sexual Harassment Prevention Act। Employer, Police, Labour Court।

options_np: Labour office, DoL, Labour Court — legal action
explanation_np: Fake/illegal contract: Department of Labour र Labour Court मा complaint।

options_np: Contract law apply — written agreement, payment terms clear
explanation_np: Freelancers: written contract, clear payment terms, IP ownership, dispute resolution clause।

options_np: Labour protections evolving — written agreements, platform policies understand
explanation_np: Gig workers: Labour Act coverage evolving। Written agreements, platform terms carefully review।

options_np: Enforceable if reasonable — scope, duration, geography limited
explanation_np: Non-compete: Nepal courts enforce if reasonable scope, time, geography। Overly broad = unenforceable।

options_np: Fake investors, equity fraud, IP theft — legal structure, contracts important
explanation_np: Startup fraud: fake investors (advance fee), equity manipulation, IP theft। Legal structure important।

options_np: Upfront fees, unrealistic valuations, no due diligence — verified networks मात्र
explanation_np: Angel investor scam: advance fees (legit investors don't charge), verify through business networks।

options_np: Fake term sheets, valuation fraud, equity manipulation — lawyers involve गर्ने
explanation_np: VC fraud: fake term sheets, manipulated valuations। Legal counsel involve गर्नुस्।

options_np: OCR: ocr.gov.np — online/offline, PAN registration, trade license
explanation_np: Business registration: OCR: ocr.gov.np, PAN (IRD), trade license (municipality) — official process।

question_np: Sole proprietorship vs Company को फरक Nepal मा?
options_np: Sole: individual liability, Company: separate legal entity, limited liability
explanation_np: Sole: unlimited personal liability। Private Company: separate entity, limited liability — OCR register।

options_np: Written partnership deed, OCR registration, clear roles/profit sharing
explanation_np: Partnership: written deed (roles, profit/loss sharing, exit), OCR registration।

options_np: Fake franchise opportunities, advance fees — verify franchise genuineness
explanation_np: Franchise fraud: advance fees (red flag), verify franchisor track record, existing franchisee talk।

options_np: Fake company valuations, hidden liabilities, asset fraud — due diligence, lawyers
explanation_np: Merger fraud: thorough due diligence, independent valuation, legal review — professional advice।

options_np: Fake/manipulated financials — verify auditor registration, ICAN Nepal
explanation_np: Fake audits: verify auditor ICAN (Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nepal) registration।

options_np: Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nepal — CA profession regulate
explanation_np: ICAN = Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nepal। Auditors र CAs regulate।

options_np: Available — Beema Samiti registered companies बाट, property insurance
explanation_np: Property insurance including earthquake: Beema Samiti registered companies बाट available।

options_np: Government subsidized crop insurance available — Agriculture Ministry
explanation_np: Crop insurance: government subsidized scheme available। Agriculture Ministry/local offices।

options_np: Death certificate + policy document + nominee ID → insurance company directly
explanation_np: Life insurance claim: death certificate, original policy, nominee ID — directly insurance company।

options_np: Yes — government schemes + private insurers। Beema Samiti registered
explanation_np: Health insurance: government schemes (SSDF) + Beema Samiti registered private insurers।

options_np: Yes — Third party liability insurance mandatory for all vehicles
explanation_np: Nepal मा सबै vehicles को लागि third party liability insurance mandatory।

question_np: Insurance premium avoid गर्न किन नगर्ने?
explanation_np: Premium miss = coverage lapse। Emergency मा insurance claim गर्न सकिँदैन।

question_np: Life insurance nominee update किन गर्ने?
options_np: Family changes (marriage, children) reflect गर्न — correct person receives benefit
explanation_np: Nominee update: marriage, divorce, death — nominee current र correct राख्नुस्।

question_np: Insurance surrender value भनेको के हो?
options_np: Policy prematurely cancel गर्दा पाइने amount
explanation_np: Surrender value = policy prematurely cancel गर्दा insurance company ले दिने reduced amount।

options_np: Actual value भन्दा बढी insure गर्ने — moral hazard, potential fraud
explanation_np: Over-insurance: actual value भन्दा बढी coverage — moral hazard। Insurable interest principle।

options_np: Insurance company ले victim को behalf मा third party बाट recovery गर्ने right
explanation_np: Subrogation: insurance company ले victim लाई pay गरेपछि responsible third party बाट recover गर्ने right।

question_np: Nepal मा poverty र fraud को connection?
options_np: Economic vulnerability ले fraud risk बढाउँछ — awareness र financial literacy important
explanation_np: Poverty = vulnerability। Financial literacy र fraud awareness programs — poverty cycle break।

options_np: NRB, banks, NGOs, schools — multiple channels। Online resources पनि
explanation_np: Financial literacy: NRB programs, bank education, NGO workshops, school curriculum।

options_np: Savings = safe, liquid, low return। Investment = higher return, risk, longer term
explanation_np: Savings: bank/safe, liquid, lower return। Investment: higher return potential, risk, long term।

options_np: 3-6 months expenses — unexpected fraud/loss recovery buffer
explanation_np: Emergency fund: 3-6 months expenses। Job loss, medical, fraud loss — financial buffer।
Diversification: multiple asset classes, sectors, geographies — single fraud/failure impact कम।

question_np: Dollar cost averaging भनेको के हो?
options_np: Regular fixed amount invest — market timing risk कम गर्ने strategy
explanation_np: DCA = regular fixed amount invest regardless of price — long term, reduces timing risk।

options_np: Fraudsters ले 'compound returns' को lure use गर्छन् — realistic rates बुझ्नुस्
explanation_np: Fraudsters compound interest promise गर्छन् — unrealistic rates। Realistic compound: bank rates।

question_np: Debt trap fraud भनेको के हो?
options_np: High interest lending ले borrower repay नसक्ने situation — illegal moneylenders
explanation_np: Debt trap: illegal high-interest loans, rollover fees — borrower perpetually in debt।

options_np: Financial stress ले judgment impair — fraud risk बढ्छ। Support seek गर्नुस्
explanation_np: Financial stress = vulnerability। Too good to be true offers attractive लाग्छ। Support seek।

question_np: ठगी बाट बच्ने golden rule के हो?
options_np: If it sounds too good to be true, it probably is — ALWAYS verify before acting
explanation_np: Golden rule: 'Too good to be true' = red flag। ALWAYS verify through official channels before any action।
